visual: A four-part sequence on the left side: ward off, rollback, press, and push, executed in a smooth forward-and-back bow stance transition.
motion_description: Beginning with weight on the rear right leg and hands positioned vertically as if holding a ball, the person steps the left foot forward, shifting into a bow stance while sweeping the left arm up to chest height and pressing the right hand down to the hip. Both arms then extend slightly and sweep steadily downward and back to the right side as the weight shifts fully to the rear leg and the torso rotates rightward. Next, the right palm meets the inside of the left forearm to press forward together as weight returns to the front leg, completing the smooth sequence by separating the hands shoulder-width apart, drawing them back over the waist with another rearward weight shift, and executing a final continuous two-handed forward push.
